V0.2.2.description:
# New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.2
## Features
- Deathlink amnesty
- New option for hintmovie logic
- Logo in launcher
- Option to use xdotool instead of root access for Linux
- More debug comands


## Bug fixes
- Logic: Spin jump logic, 5-1 climb, etc
- One of the issues with connecting
- Grouped deathlink
V0.2.2.title: New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.2

v0.0.1.description:
**New Super Mario Bros Wii 0.0.1 Alpha Playtest release**
- OBS is not stable, not recommended to play with friends. Make savestates often and use \save in client to backup your clientsave, can restore with \load. This is just for the games internal memory when temporarily replacing savefile data.
- OBS currently does not place you in your randomized starter world so manually move with the worldmap once you in game to play in logic.
- This playtest is for dedicated community members who want to help find bugs. It is built on the new rule builder which is not yet released as of now so you will need to compile the main repo from source (until the next RC is released).
- The randomizer currently only supports US rev 2 version and playing on savefile 2 but hopefully will be able to add support to different versions down the line.
- OBS currently does not place you in your randomized starter world so manually move with the worldmap once you in game to play in logic.
- If game bug, try \reapply_checks or restart client. Some features say they are implemented but currently doesn't work, will fix in the future. (Deathlink, HUD messages, ISO patch and some move items).
- The client has a built-in tracker which I recommend using. To get it to work place the tracker.apworld in your worlds folder and open the client. https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases?q=Tracker.

TLDR
- Read the documentation to set it up (just download and double-click the nsmbw.apworld). https://github.com/Miiroun/Archipelago-NewSuperMarioBrosWii/tree/main/worlds/nsmbw/docs
- Check it out at https://github.com/Miiroun/Archipelago-NewSuperMarioBrosWii/releases (needs updated core).
v0.0.1.title: v0.0.1 Alpha Playtest

v0.0.2.description:
# Features
* Options (Added but not all combinations tested, report if something is problematic)
* Improved level connection logic
* Power-ups are now progressive
* Deathlink works but is buggy ( sends check when in pipes)


# Bugs Fixed
* Did not open in 0.6.7-rc1
* Spelling in docs
* Did not send completion check
* Death on main menu
* Not properly goaling
v0.0.2.title: v0.0.2 Playtest

v0.1.0.description:
## New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.1.0 update - The Movement Update
# Features
- Movement update (beta)
- Time (beta)
- Inventory items (toad houses)
- Location and item groups
- Better saving feature
- Glitched logic support
- Reworked features to allow better support for other game versions. (US rev2 is still recommend but other should work with movement and time options disabled)
- New docs
- Support for external pop-tracker pack (pack doesn't exist yet)


Slight rework of setup, make sure you are in game, on the world map before connecting.


# Bugs fixed
- Hint moves didn't unlock in game
- Bowser unlock logic was reversed
- More smaller ones
- Did not work on Linux


# Credit
- Thanks to react for creating all the logic for the movement feature.
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0 - The movement update

v0.2.0.description:
# New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.0
## Content
- More movement
- New Filler and Trap Items
- Deathlink-groups
- More quality of life options
- Quality of life patches
- Auto save
- Items / Locations have better names
- More client commands
- Reworked logic backend to give access to a readable /explain



## Bug fixes
- Deathlink works
- 4-A and 6-A are now accessible
- Game froze on death in a few levels
- You can now select both .iso and .wbfs as a game file
- Incorrect Logic
- Logic now displays correctly with UT /explain
- Inventory power-ups now work on other game version
- Added error for Linux user that it requires root access
- Castles did not get marked as completed


## New setup
Change the following setting in dolphin for a better experience:
- Open dolphin, go to options → Configuration → Interface → Hotkeys Require Window Focus → off
- this is IMPORTANT for death-link and movement to work correctly
v0.2.0.title: New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.0
